title: StepProof Scenario
description: Schema for a stepproof scenario YAML file

iterations.description: Number of times to run the full scenario

variables.description: Global variables available in prompt templates as {{variable_name}}

steps.description: Ordered list of steps to execute per iteration

id.description: Unique step identifier (snake_case). Referenced as {{step_id.output}} in later steps.

provider.description: LLM provider to use for this step

prompt.description: Prompt template. Use {{variable}} for substitution, {{step_id.output}} for prior step outputs.

min_pass_rate.description: Minimum fraction of iterations that must pass assertions (0.0–1.0). CI exits 1 if below this.

assertions.description: List of assertions to run on the step output

value.description: For contains/not_contains: the substring to check. For regex: the pattern.

schema.description: For json_schema: path to JSON schema file (relative to scenario file)

prompt.description: For llm_judge: the evaluation prompt. The step output is appended automatically.

pass_on.description: For llm_judge: the expected response prefix (case-insensitive). Default: "yes"

provider.description: For llm_judge: which provider to use. Default: anthropic

model.description: For llm_judge: override model. Defaults to cheapest available (haiku/gpt-4o-mini)
